content:
这是一个计算机系大学生的博客(蒟蒻一枚)

我的兴趣

  • 一个技术很菜的篮球爱好者，热衷于投篮
  • 喜欢看书，看书过程中脑子里会跳出许多奇怪的想法
  • 喜欢听歌，华语流行乐，欧美流行摇滚乐，最钟爱纯音乐，纯音乐可以体现一个人的思想感情，可惜附近喜欢纯音乐的人很少
  • 逐渐走入摄影的坑，苦于没有专业技术，只得用手机的专业模式来记录生活
  • 非资深军事迷
  • 喜欢唱歌的吉他小白
  • 没钱换吉他的指弹狂热者

关于这个博客

  • 记录自己学习编程的历程
  • 记录自己转眼即逝的灵感或有趣的想法
  • 自己每半个月的想法感受
  • 自己读书后的想法

最后

欢迎在博客的留言板找我交流，感谢！
联系方式
zhang44378@163.com
jaydenc1830@gmail.com

This blog is created by a normal college student who major in software engine.

My interests

  • a basketball enthusiast who has poor skill, enjoy shooting ball
  • like reading books. Many strange, interesting ideas pop up in my mind during the process of reading
  • like listening to music. Chinese pop songs, European and American pop rock music. Like pure music most. Unfortunately, there are very few people nearby who like pure music.
  • like photography, but have no professional camera.
  • Non-senior military fan
  • like singing with guitar
  • A Fingerstyle lover who have no money to update my guitar

About this blog

  • Record my learning process on coding
  • Record my fleeting inspiration or interesting thoughts
  • My thoughts after reading

At last

welcome to talk to me on the message box.

contact me

zhang44378@163.com

jaydenc1830@gmail.com
